title: Size Exclusion Chromatography with Multiangle Light Scattering (SEC-MALS)
steps: Concentrate the purified protein sample to 4-5 mg/ml

Instruments: Agilent 1200 HPLC system (Agilent Technologies, Santa Clara, CA) Wyatt DAWN HELEOS-II MALS instrument Wyatt Optilab rEX differential refractometer (Wyatt, Santa Barbara, CA)WTC-050S5 size-exclusion column (Wyatt) 40 ul sample loop
Equilibrate the system and column with buffer containing: 25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 200 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl 2 , 2 mM TCEP Overnight
Turn on the laser 1 hour before the experiment. Confirm the readout is stable
Run 5 mg/ml BSA to calibrate the system
Inject the sample and run (takes ~1 hour/sample)
Analyze the results by ASTRA V software (Wyatt). MALS signals, combined with the protein concentration determined by refractive index, are used to calculate the molecular mass of the complex.
creator: Minghao Chen
